subject: Sociology
title: Education and Globalization
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on Education and Globalization.

hook.text: A student in Kenya studies a British curriculum. A Chinese student preps for the American SAT. Borders blur.

buildup.text: Globalization standardizes educational models. PISA rankings push countries to conform to similar benchmarks.

discovery.text: Western educational models spread globally, sometimes displacing local knowledge systems and traditions.

twist.text: Countries ranking highest on tests don't always produce the most innovative or creative thinkers.

climax.text: Global education creates shared standards but risks erasing the diversity that makes different cultures valuable.

punchline.text: One world, one test, many lost traditions.

quiz.question: How does globalization affect education?
options: It standardizes models and can displace local traditions
